text:
Created attachment 160105
error message of spidermonkey

Environment:
FreeBSD Current 11 ppc64


Description:
spidermonkey170 is a dep. of polkit(libmozjs-17.0.so). This build fail with the following attachment showing the discrepancy. I have tried spidermonkey185 with no avail. 


How to Repeat:
cd to lang/spidermonkey170 to make install.

Fix:
None tried spidermonkey17. But there is no libmozjs.
